Transcrição Completa: 12 How To Become An Expert

 

[00:00]"You can choose to play the role of an expert or a specialist and that's always going to make you more money than if you take the general approach."

 

[00:08]"So just to dive a little deeper into that topic, the definition of an expert word for word, a person who has a comprehensive and authoritative knowledge of a skill in a particular area."

 

[00:20]"So as an example of how you can choose to be an expert, it comes down to the amount of knowledge that you have in one specific vertical, one specific area or a few different verticals and areas."

 

[00:32]"As an example of that, in the digital marketing vertical, okay, taking all the different services, skills, and things that we could offer as agency owners, if you choose one particular skill over another, and you compound the knowledge that you have in that one skill over all the other skills that you can choose, well, guess what?"

 

[00:52]"You'll be more valuable in that one particular skill and selling it than all the other skills that all the other people in the market are selling."

 

[01:00]"Even if somebody is choosing to sell the exact same thing that you're selling, if you know more than them, if you're more confident than them to be able to bring people results with what you know, 10 out of 10, you're going to get more business than the other person because you have the role of an expert or specialist rather than the generalized approach or the more amateurish approach."

 

[01:22]"It's very easy to see when somebody's an amateur or somebody's an expert. It just comes down to the brevity of knowledge that they have in one particular area over all the other areas."

 

[01:32]"Now, if you start talking to me about cooking food, I'm a vegan. I couldn't talk to you about nutrition. I couldn't talk to you in depth as much depth that I can talk about with digital marketing, running agencies, creating info products to sell comparatively to if I would talk about nutrition, cooking, and how to just be an overall vegan chef as an example."

 

[01:54]"The brevity of knowledge that I hold in one area makes me more more valuable in that one area than it does in all the other areas in life that I could participate in."

 

[02:04]"Given I want to be a personal trainer, well, I don't know much about personal training, right? So, if I go and I try to start selling all of a sudden personal training services, because I have such a low level of knowledge, a low level of experience in that one particular vertical, I'm not going to make as much money as I would going with the one vertical that I'm an expert and an authority figure in as a specialist, right?"

 

[02:28]"So, you need to choose. Don't choose the wrong skill."

 

[02:32]"Digital marketing as a whole, there are so many different skills that you can learn. Marketing automation, chat bots, advertising on all the different platforms. You could be a Facebook ad expert. You could be a Google Adwords expert. You could be a Pinterest ads expert. You could be a Snapchat ads expert."

 

[02:50]"There's so many different things you could do. You could specialize in making video content, social media content, Instagram growth, PR specialist."

 

[02:58]"There are so many different things that you could become an expert or an authority figure in just in the digital marketing vertical alone."

 

[03:06]"I want you to really consider here. Pick your industry, pick your niche, and become an expert by compounding the knowledge that you can acquire and apply in to help make you more money and scale your agency up."

 

[03:20]"Just make sure you choose the right skill. I'll see you in the next video."

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

CONCEITO PRINCIPAL:

Especialista/Expert vs Generalista = Mais dinheiro e valor no mercado

Definição de Expert: pessoa com conhecimento abrangente e autoritativo em uma área específica

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Escolher UMA habilidade específica dentro do marketing digital

Compor conhecimento profundo em área única ao invés de conhecimento superficial em múltiplas áreas

Focar em vertical/nicho específico para construir autoridade

Especialização gera mais confiança e mais negócios (10 out of 10)

 

ESTRUTURA:

Expert/Specialist > Generalist > Amateur (hierarquia de valor)

Profundidade de conhecimento = diferencial competitivo

Conhecimento concentrado em uma área > conhecimento disperso em várias

 

EXEMPLOS DE ESPECIALIZAÇÕES EM MARKETING DIGITAL:

Marketing Automation

Chatbots

Facebook Ads Expert

Google Adwords Expert

Pinterest Ads Expert

Snapchat Ads Expert

Video Content Creation

Social Media Content

Instagram Growth

PR Specialist

 

PRINCÍPIO CHAVE: Brevidade (profundidade) de conhecimento em UMA área específica determina seu valor e capacidade de gerar receita

 

DURAÇÃO: ~3:30 minutos FORMATO: Vídeo educacional/treinamento direto para câmera
